title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements across Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable NoSQL databases, highlighting architectural innovations and product roadmaps designed for AI and agentic workloads. The session covered product releases, customer stories, and strategies for high-performance, flexible, and scalable database services.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session surveys advancements across three NoSQL databases: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable. It covers architectural innovations and product roadmaps positioned for AI and agentic workloads, alongside product releases, customer stories, and strategies for high-performance, flexible, and scalable database services. The framing connects NoSQL design choices to the demands of modern apps and AI agents.
